title: Mozart AI builds a generative audio workstation with ElevenLabs
text:
Mozart AI builds a generative audio workstation with ElevenLabs
Written by
Juliette
Rolnick
Published
Jan 9, 2026
Listen
Listen to this article

Mozart AI
is building a generative audio workstation that combines ease of use with DAW-level control. ElevenLabs has been a core partner since Mozart AI’s inception, providing the generative music API that underpins the platform.
Granular music creation built on the Eleven Music API
Mozart AI uses the
Eleven Music
API to build detailed, production-grade tools inside a modern DAW environment.
The Eleven Music API offers developers the ability to:
Generate high-quality tracks from simple text prompts
Customize track length, structure, and language
Separate up to six discrete stems for precise, granular control
Edit granular sections of a track and regenerate specific parts
In Studio sessions on Mozart AI, users can generate clean, isolated stems and treat them as editable components rather than final outputs. These stems can be extended, rearranged, and refined alongside MIDI generation, real-time MIDI and audio recording, and low-latency playback.
The workstation includes mixers, effects, and synth generation, with VST support planned. This gives creators the ability to work at a very granular level, shaping individual elements of a track while keeping the experience fast and approachable.
By building on ElevenLabs’ music models via the API, Mozart AI focused on workflow design and creative control, resulting in a DAW that feels intuitive without sacrificing depth.
A flexible platform for modern musicians
Music creators work in different ways. Some want fast results with minimal friction. Others want deep control over stems, MIDI, and production detail. By building on our generative audio models through the API, Mozart AI can offer everything from granular, DAW-style tools to simplified workflows for creators who want fewer decisions and faster output. The platform does not force a single creative process. It adapts to the level of control each creator needs.
"ElevenLabs has been a core partner since our inception, providing the generative audio models that power stem editing and full song creation. Their API has been foundational in helping us build flexible tools that serve both advanced producers and creators who want a more streamlined experience." - Sundar Arvind, Co-founder and CEO, Mozart AI
Building the next generation of music creation tools
Together, Mozart AI and ElevenLabs show how generative music models can be embedded directly into professional creative tools without abstracting away control. By exposing our state-of-the-art music model through an API, teams like Mozart AI can build workstations that meet musicians where they are, whether they are sketching ideas quickly or producing tracks with full technical precision.
